description: Add board ownership to ticket statuses in the existing statuses schema while leaving non-ticket statuses unchanged.
Add data constraints and indexes that support board-scoped ticket status uniqueness and lookup performance.
Clone current tenant-wide ticket statuses once per board during migration, preserving metadata and assigning new status ids.
Build a deterministic migration remap from old global ticket status ids to new board-owned ticket status ids by board.
Remap existing ticket rows to the new board-owned ticket status ids during migration.
Remap inbound ticket default status references using board context during migration.
Remap billing renewal default ticket status references using board context during migration.
Remap per-contract renewal ticket status references using board context during migration.
Remap saved workflow ticket status references when board context exists in the stored configuration or action payload.
Detect and explicitly surface persisted ticket status references that cannot be remapped safely because board context is missing.
Make ticket default status resolution board-aware everywhere new tickets are created.
Validate board and status compatibility on ticket creation paths.
Validate board and status compatibility on ticket update paths.
Require explicit destination-board status selection whenever a ticket board is changed.
Extend board creation to support seeding statuses by copying from an existing board.
Extend board creation to support creating board-local statuses inline.
Enforce board-local status rules during board create/edit, including at least one valid open default status.
Embed a board-local ticket status manager into board editing.
Retire the central ticket status settings surface as the source of truth for ticket statuses.
Scope ticket status CRUD actions and models by board for ticket status operations.
Support board-local ticket status reorder, default, open/closed, and delete rules without affecting other boards.
Make ticket status picker components board-dependent instead of tenant-global.
Update ticket create flows so status options remain empty or disabled until a board is chosen.
Update ticket edit flows to reload valid statuses for the selected board and clear invalid status selections on board change.
Update the quick-add ticket flow to use board-scoped statuses.
Make inbound ticket defaults choose ticket statuses from the selected board only.
Make billing renewal settings choose ticket statuses from the selected board only.
Make workflow ticket action authoring use board-aware ticket status pickers and dependencies.
Enforce board/status compatibility in workflow runtime ticket create and update operations.
Make workflow ticket close/default/open status resolution use board-owned ticket statuses.
Make client portal ticket create and update flows use board-scoped ticket statuses.
Convert ticket status lookup APIs into board-scoped ticket status lookups.
Update generic status APIs and shared status actions so ticket statuses are no longer treated as tenant-global.
Update ticket list, search, reporting, and join-heavy ticket read paths to resolve board-owned ticket statuses correctly.
Update SLA pause configuration and SLA ticket reporting to use board-owned ticket statuses without behavior regression.
Update notification, survey, and other ticket event subscribers to resolve remapped board-owned ticket statuses correctly.
Update onboarding and import flows so new ticket statuses are created as board-owned records.
Update seeds, fixtures, and workflow harness setup to create board-owned ticket statuses.
Add DB-backed migration coverage proving status clone/remap correctness for tickets and board-context configuration.
Add UI and integration coverage for board create/edit status management and required status reselection on board change.
Add workflow and billing regression coverage proving saved ticket-status configuration still resolves after migration remap.
Add API and client portal regression coverage for board-scoped ticket status lookup and validation behavior.
Update any bulk ticket update surfaces to validate board-scoped status selections.
Update auxiliary board-aware ticket creation helpers such as asset or project-linked ticket creation to use board-scoped statuses.
